title: Variable slot reuse — repurpose length variable as checkpoint slot to save a declaration
trigger_patterns: single storage slot reuse in assembly
explanation: lengthSlot is used first to load the packed slot (extracting length via bit shifting). Once length is extracted into result, lengthSlot is no longer needed in its original capacity — it gets overwritten with the derived checkpointSlot. This avoids an additional local variable declaration, reducing stack pressure slightly.
when_to_apply: Assembly blocks where an input variable's purpose is fully consumed before a derived value is needed
when_not_to_apply: When the original variable is still needed after the reuse point
